title: Sailing Along
writer: Sonnie Hale, Selwyn Jepson, Lesser Samuels
actors: Jessie Matthews, Barry MacKay, Jack Whiting
plot: A young orphan woman and a young man were brought up together. She is a 'genius' dancer and he is a 'genius' stockbroker. They both realise their potential. After, they realise they are in love and decide to return to the sailing ...
